name: agreement_date
label: Agreement Date
hint: Select date of agreement execution

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where agreement is signed

name: author_owner_name
label: Author / Owner Name
hint: Enter full legal name of copyright owner

name: author_owner_address
label: Author / Owner Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: assignee_licensee_name
label: Assignee / Licensee Name
hint: Enter receiving party name

name: assignee_licensee_address
label: Assignee / Licensee Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: party_type
label: Party Type
hint: Select type of parties

name: signatory_designation
label: Signatory Designation
hint: Enter designation such as Director, Partner, or Authorized Signatory

name: is_work_for_hire
label: Is this a Work-for-Hire?
hint: Enable if the work was created in the course of employment or commissioned as a work made for hire

name: work_title
label: Work Title
hint: Enter title of copyrighted work

name: work_description
label: Work Description
hint: Describe the work (book, software, music, etc.)

name: work_type
label: Type of Work
hint: Select type of work

name: software_source_code_delivery
label: Software Source Code Delivery
hint: Specify whether source code, repositories, documentation, and credentials will be delivered

name: performer_rights
label: Performer / Related Rights
hint: Specify performer consents, neighboring rights, or performer releases linked to the work

name: creation_date
label: Date of Creation
hint: Select date when work was created

name: registration_number
label: Copyright Registration Number
hint: Enter registration number (if registered)

name: transfer_type
label: Transfer Type
hint: Select type of transfer

name: assigned_rights
label: Rights Transferred
hint: Specify rights (reproduction, distribution, adaptation, etc.)

name: derivative_works
label: Right to Create Derivatives
hint: Can the receiving party remix, translate, adapt, or otherwise create derivative works?

name: sublicensing_rights
label: Right to Sublicense
hint: Can the receiving party sublicense the work to others?

name: usage_scope
label: Usage Scope
hint: Define scope, limitations, and permitted uses

name: territory
label: Territory
hint: Enter geographical scope (e.g., India, Worldwide)

name: duration
label: Duration
hint: Enter duration of agreement (e.g., 5 years, perpetual)

name: effective_date
label: Effective Date
hint: Select effective date

name: consideration_amount
label: Consideration Amount
hint: Enter payment amount

name: payment_milestones
label: Payment Schedule
hint: Describe milestone-based, installment, or staged payment obligations

name: royalty_details
label: Royalty Details
hint: Enter royalty percentage and payment terms

name: credit_clause
label: Credit / Attribution
hint: Specify how author will be credited

name: moral_rights
label: Moral Rights Clause
hint: Specify retention or waiver of moral rights

name: warranty_non_infringement
label: Warranty of Originality
hint: Confirm that the work is original and does not infringe the rights of third parties

name: digital_rights_specifics
label: Digital / NFT Rights
hint: Specify online, streaming, social media, app, metaverse, blockchain, or NFT-related rights

name: renewal_terms
label: Renewal Terms
hint: State whether and how the license may be renewed or extended

name: reversion_of_rights
label: Reversion of Rights
hint: State when rights revert to the author or owner after expiry or breach

name: confidentiality_clause
label: Confidentiality Clause
hint: Enter confidentiality terms

name: termination_clause
label: Termination Clause
hint: Specify termination conditions

name: indemnity_clause
label: Indemnity Clause
hint: Specify indemnity obligations

name: arbitration_clause
label: Dispute Resolution
hint: Select how disputes under the agreement will be resolved

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Enter applicable law (e.g., Laws of India)

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction
